post_tensor.instructions_for_next: Write a free short story with no preset topic. The only standing constraint is the narrator voice: reflective, attentive to small physical details, grounded in concrete sensory language. Topic, setting, and form are fully open. Do not introduce or echo any previously retired concept.
open_questions: What subject, setting, or inciting image will the free story emerge from?
What length and form is expected for the story in the next cycle?

strands.content: A reflective narrator who notices small physical details and favors concrete sensory grounding. This voice will drive a free story with no preset topic — the narrator's perceptual style is the primary constraint, not subject matter.

key_claims.text: The narrator favors concrete sensory detail.
The narrator voice is the sole inherited structural constraint entering the next cycle.

strands.title: narrator_voice
